source.business_scenario: film 主查询 + 相关 film_actor 子查询
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT f.film_id, f.title,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film_actor fa WHERE fa.film_id = f.film_id) AS actor_cnt
FROM film f
WHERE f.rating = 'PG'
LIMIT 20
